summary: Board Report Period Selector & PDF Export testing completed. All backend APIs (available-periods, aggregated) passed 13/13 tests. Frontend UI fully functional with period type selector (Mensual/Trimestral/Anual), dynamic period options, aggregated data display, and PDF/Excel export buttons working correctly.

GET /api/financial-statements/available-.description: Returns structured period options: specific_months (Enero 2024, etc), quarters (Q1 2024), annual (Año 2024), generic (Último mes)

GET /api/financial-statements/aggregated.description: Returns aggregated financial data for selected period type. Correctly sums income statement data for quarters (3 months) and uses latest balance sheet.

periods_included_indicator.description: Shows 'Períodos incluidos: 2024-01, 2024-02, 2024-03' only when multiple periods selected

pdf_export.verification: Button enabled, click triggers PDF generation with success toast 'PDF generado exitosamente'

excel_export.verification: Button enabled, click triggers Excel download with success toast 'Excel exportado exitosamente'

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1, -1) during page load - not blocking but could be improved with explicit dimensions
seed_data_creation: Existing data for 2024-01, 2024-02, 2024-03 used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Board Report with period selector fully tested. Backend endpoints /available-periods and /aggregated working correctly. Frontend page /board-report has 3 selectors (language, period type, period) and export buttons (PDF, Excel). Available financial data: Enero 2024, Febrero 2024, Marzo 2024. Q1 2024 quarter aggregation verified working.

mocked_apis.notes: All APIs are REAL - Financial statements module uses real MongoDB storage

quarterly_aggregation_verification.verification: PASSED - Quarterly sum matches sum of monthly values
